fields.helpText: The words contained in this field will be excluded from indexing or from the user's input prior to invoking the look-up utility, depending on the action indicated.

fields.setOfCodes: I:EXCLUDE FROM INDEXING ONLY;L:EXCLUDE FROM LOOKUP ONLY;B:EXCLUDE FROM BOTH INDEXING AND LOOKUP;
fields.helpText: This field indicates the action to take with the excluded word, exclude from (I)ndexing, (L)ook-up or (B)oth indexing and look-up.
